description: Large feature spanning multiple files. effort=l (needs breakdown), priority=p3.

issue.title: [Feature] Add multi-window support to the desktop app
issue.body:
Currently the desktop app is single-window. We'd like to add the ability to open multiple project windows (each with its own working directory) — similar to VS Code's multi-window support.

Scope:
- IPC contract for `window:create` (probably need a new procedure in `packages/api/src/routes/system/`)
- Preload wiring in `apps/desktop/src/preload/index.ts`
- React renderer changes to support the per-window state model
- Persistence (which windows should restore on next launch?)

This is a multi-week effort. I want a plan / breakdown before anyone starts.

expected.rationale: Multi-week feature — Tech Lead needs to scope and break down
